MCD.rationale: MCD trades at the lower end of its 1-year P/E range with best-in-class margins, but declining sequential revenue/EPS and inflation-driven cost pressure temper the upside, yielding only a mild long lean.
key_factors: P/E diluted 25.95x sits in the lower half of the 22.1-35.8x 1-year range, suggesting modest de-rating
Best-in-class profitability: net margin 29.9%, operating margin 43.7%
Sequential revenue/EPS decline: Q3'21 rev $6.20B/EPS $2.86 → Q4'21 $6.01B/$2.18 → Q1'22 $5.67B/$1.48
News flow frames MCD as a defensive consumer play amid soaring inflation (Dow Jones, Zacks articles)
Price essentially flat over 3 months at -0.2%, consolidating in $229-$252 range
